name: Alphabet Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Cornstarch dissolved in 1/4 cup Water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot, combine water and bouillon. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
3. Add carrots, rutabaga, celery, and onions. Simmer for an additional 15 minutes or until vegetables are tender but not mushy.
4. Separately, cook, rinse, drain, and cool barley and alphabet pasta. Set aside.
5. After the vegetables are tender, add tomatoes, peas, and green beans. Continue simmering for another 5 minutes.
6. Stir in cornstarch mixture. Allow soup to thicken slightly.
7. Add cooled barley and pasta. Heat only long enough to warm all ingredients.
